tasks.label: CTOA: Preflight Mobile Console Env
args: $required = 'CTOA_OWNER_USER','CTOA_OWNER_PASSWORD','CTOA_OPERATOR_USER','CTOA_OPERATOR_PASSWORD','CTOA_MOBILE_TOKEN'; $missing = $required | Where-Object { [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace((Get-Item -Path "Env:$_" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Value) }; if ($missing.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('Missing required env vars: ' + ($missing -join ', ')); exit 1 }; Write-Host 'Mobile console env preflight PASS'

tasks.label: CTOA: Start CTOAi Free Mode
args: $envPath = Join-Path (Get-Location) '.env'; if (-not (Test-Path $envPath)) { Write-Error 'Missing .env file'; exit 1 }; Get-Content $envPath | Where-Object { $_ -and -not $_.StartsWith('#') -and $_ -match '=' } | ForEach-Object { $name, $value = $_ -split '=', 2; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($name, $value, 'Process') }; & .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn api.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8011

args: $owner='famatyyk'; $repo='CTOAi'; $path='requirements-bot.txt'; $branch='main'; $msg='fix(cd): install fastapi and uvicorn for dashboard container'; $sha = gh api "repos/$owner/$repo/contents/$path?ref=$branch" --jq .sha; $content = [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('requirements-bot.txt')); $body = @{ message=$msg; content=$content; sha=$sha; branch=$branch } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $body | gh api "repos/$owner/$repo/contents/$path" --method PUT --input -

tasks.label: Commit requirements fix to main
args: $repo='famatyyk/CTOAi'; $path='requirements-bot.txt'; $branch='main'; $msg='fix(cd): install fastapi and uvicorn for dashboard container'; $sha = gh api "repos/$repo/contents/$path?ref=$branch" --jq .sha; $content = [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('requirements-bot.txt')); $body = @{ message=$msg; content=$content; sha=$sha; branch=$branch } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $body | gh api "repos/$repo/contents/$path" --method PUT --input - --jq '.commit.sha + " " + .commit.html_url'

tasks.label: Commit requirements fix (explicit sha)

tasks.label: CTOA: Sprint-070 Cleanup Documentation Sync
args: $root='C:\Users\zycie\CTOAi'; $gitignore=Join-Path $root '.gitignore'; $cleanupDoc=Join-Path $root 'docs\REPO_CLEANUP_WAVES.md'; $progressDoc=Join-Path $root 'docs\history\sprints\SPRINT-070-PROGRESS.md'; $archiveRoot=Join-Path $root '_local_archive\sprint-070'; $moved=@('training/ctoa-merged','training/ctoa-1.5b-q4km.gguf','training/kaggle-output','training/kaggle-output-final','training/kaggle-output-v24','training/kaggle-output-v25','training/kaggle-output-v26','training/kaggle-output-v3','training/kaggle-upload','training/logs-v4','training/logs-v5','training/logs-v6','training/logs-v7','artifacts/enc3','labs/projects','labs/__pycache__'); $manifest=[ordered]@{ archivedAt=(Get-Date).ToString('s'); archiveRoot='_local_archive/sprint-070'; moved=$moved; keptInPlace=@('bot','tools/rosetta-assembler'); rationale=@{ bot='active source surface'; 'tools/rosetta-assembler'='configured in .gitmodules as submodule'; labs='top-level directory left empty after archival of payload'; training='only source-side assets remain in place' } }; $manifest | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $archiveRoot 'manifest.json') -Encoding UTF8; $gitText=Get-Content $gitignore -Raw; if($gitText -notmatch '(?m)^_local_archive/$'){ Add-Content -Path $gitignore -Value "`r`n# Local archive created during repo cleanup`r`n_local_archive/" -Encoding UTF8 }; $cleanupText=Get-Content $cleanupDoc -Raw; if($cleanupText -notmatch '## Wave 2 and Wave 3 Executed'){ Add-Content -Path $cleanupDoc -Value "`r`n## Wave 2 and Wave 3 Executed`r`n`r`n- Archive root: _local_archive/sprint-070`r`n- Executed moves:`r`n  - training/ctoa-merged`r`n  - training/ctoa-1.5b-q4km.gguf`r`n  - training/kaggle-output`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-final`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-v24`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-v25`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-v26`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-v3`r`n  - training/kaggle-upload`r`n  - training/logs-v4`r`n  - training/logs-v5`r`n  - training/logs-v6`r`n  - training/logs-v7`r`n  - artifacts/enc3`r`n  - labs/projects`r`n  - labs/__pycache__`r`n- Kept in place:`r`n  - bot (active source surface)`r`n  - tools/rosetta-assembler (.gitmodules submodule)`r`n- Result:`r`n  - training now keeps only source-side assets`r`n  - labs top-level payload removed`r`n  - artifacts forensic payload removed from main repo paths`r`n" -Encoding UTF8 }; $progressText=Get-Content $progressDoc -Raw; if($progressText -notmatch '## Cleanup Execution Completed'){ Add-Content -Path $progressDoc -Value "`r`n## Cleanup Execution Completed`r`n`r`n- Archive root created: _local_archive/sprint-070`r`n- Physical cleanup completed for training heavy outputs, artifacts payload, and labs payloads`r`n- Verification result:`r`n  - moved targets verified out of original paths`r`n  - training left with source-side assets only`r`n  - labs left empty`r`n- Explicit keep decisions preserved:`r`n  - bot`r`n  - tools/rosetta-assembler (submodule path from .gitmodules)`r`n" -Encoding UTF8

tasks.label: CTOA: Security Fixes Round1
args:
from pathlib import Path
import re
root=Path(r'C:\Users\zycie\CTOAi')
app_path=root/'mobile_console'/'app.py'
exec_path=root/'runner'/'agents'/'executor.py'
text=app_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
if 'import shlex' not in text:
    text=text.replace('import subprocess
','import subprocess
import shlex
',1)
if 'from urllib.parse import urlparse' not in text:
    text=text.replace('from urllib.request import urlopen
','from urllib.request import urlopen
from urllib.parse import urlparse
',1)
run_pat=re.compile(r'def _run\(cmd: str, timeout: int = 20, cwd: Optional\[str\] = None\) -> dict:
(?:    .*
)+?
(?=def _run_argv\()',re.MULTILINE)
run_new='def _run(cmd: str, timeout: int = 20, cwd: Optional[str] = None) -> dict:
    try:
        args = shlex.split(cmd, posix=not _is_windows_host())
    except ValueError as exc:
        return {"code": 1, "stdout": "", "stderr": str(exc)[:200]}

    if not args:
        return {"code": 1, "stdout": "", "stderr": "Empty command"}

    return _run_argv(args, timeout=timeout, cwd=cwd)

'
text=run_pat.sub(run_new,text,count=1)
if 'def _validate_http_url(url: str) -> str:' not in text:
    helper='

def _validate_http_url(url: str) -> str:
    parsed = urlparse(url)
    if parsed.scheme not in {"http", "https"}:
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported URL scheme: {parsed.scheme or 'missing'}")
    if not parsed.netloc:
        raise ValueError("URL host is required")
    return url
'
    text=text.replace('
def _intel_api_health_probe() -> dict:
',helper+'

def _intel_api_health_probe() -> dict:
',1)
text=text.replace('    try:
        with urlopen(url, timeout=5) as response:
','    try:
        _validate_http_url(url)
        with urlopen(url, timeout=5) as response:
')
text=text.replace('    try:
        with urlopen(url, timeout=timeout) as response:
','    try:
        _validate_http_url(url)
        with urlopen(url, timeout=timeout) as response:
')
text=text.replace('        cmd = f"tail -n {lines} {path} 2>/dev/null || echo '(log not found)'"
        return _run(cmd, timeout=10)
','        result = _run_argv(["tail", "-n", str(lines), str(path)], timeout=10)
        if result.get("code", 1) != 0:
            return {"code": 0, "stdout": "(log not found)", "stderr": ""}
        return result
')
text=text.replace('        cmd = f"psql \"{dsn}\" -t -A -c {json.dumps(filled)}"
        return _run(cmd, timeout=timeout)
','        return _run_argv(["psql", dsn, "-t", "-A", "-c", filled], timeout=timeout)
')
app_path.write_text(text,encoding='utf-8')
exec_text=exec_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').replace('**Document Updated:** {timestamp}','**Document Timestamp:** {timestamp}')
exec_path.write_text(exec_text,encoding='utf-8')
print('SECURITY_FIXES_APPLIED')

tasks.label: Runtime Validation HTTP E2E
args:
import json, urllib.request
from urllib.error import HTTPError

def req(path, method='GET', token=None, payload=None):
    url = 'http://127.0.0.1:8001' + path
    data = None if payload is None else json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
    headers = {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    if token:
        headers['Authorization'] = f'Bearer {token}'
    request = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers=headers, method=method)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=20) as response:
        return response.status, json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8'))

status = req('/api/status')
print('STATUS_OK', status[0], status[1].get('provider'), status[1].get('route_mode'))

login_status, login_data = req('/api/auth/login', 'POST', payload={'username':'famatyyk','password':'ctoa-owner'})
assert login_status == 200, login_data
owner_token = login_data['token']
print('OWNER_LOGIN_OK', login_status)

me_status, me_data = req('/api/auth/me', token=owner_token)
assert me_status == 200 and me_data['user']['role'] == 'owner', me_data
print('ME_OK', me_status, me_data['user']['role'])

try:
    register_status, register_data = req('/api/auth/register', 'POST', payload={'username':'beast_member','password':'beastpass123','role':'member'})
    assert register_status in (200, 409), register_data
    print('REGISTER_OK', register_status)
except HTTPError as e:
    body = e.read().decode('utf-8')
    raise AssertionError(f'register failed: {e.code} {body}')

invite_status, invite_data = req('/api/community/invite', 'POST', token=owner_token, payload={'username':'beast_member','role':'operator'})
assert invite_status == 200, invite_data
invite_code = invite_data['invite']['code']
print('INVITE_OK', invite_status)

member_status, member_data = req('/api/auth/login', 'POST', payload={'username':'beast_member','password':'beastpass123'})
assert member_status == 200, member_data
member_token = member_data['token']
print('MEMBER_LOGIN_OK', member_status)

accept_status, accept_data = req('/api/community/invite/accept', 'POST', token=member_token, payload={'code': invite_code})
assert accept_status == 200, accept_data
member_token = accept_data['token']
print('ACCEPT_OK', accept_status)

members_status, members_data = req('/api/community/members', token=member_token)
assert members_status == 200 and any(m['username'] == 'beast_member' for m in members_data['members']), members_data
print('MEMBERS_OK', members_status)

feed_status, feed_data = req('/api/community/feed', token=member_token)
assert feed_status == 200, feed_data
print('FEED_OK', feed_status)

invites_status, invites_data = req('/api/community/invites', token=owner_token)
assert invites_status == 200, invites_data
print('INVITES_OK', invites_status)

print('HTTP_E2E_OK')

    headers = {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    if token:
        headers['Authorization'] = f'Bearer {token}'
    req = urllib.request.Request(u + path, data=data, headers=headers, method=method)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as resp:
        return resp.status, json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8'))

print('HTTP_AUTH_COMMUNITY_E2E_OK')

import json
import urllib.request

BASE = 'http://127.0.0.1:8001'

def req(path, method='GET', token=None, payload=None):
    data = None if payload is None else json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
    headers = {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    if token:
        headers['Authorization'] = f'Bearer {token}'
    request = urllib.request.Request(BASE + path, data=data, headers=headers, method=method)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=20) as response:
        return response.status, json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8'))

status, data = req('/api/status')
assert status == 200, data
print('STATUS_OK', data.get('provider'), data.get('route_mode'))

status, data = req('/api/auth/login', 'POST', payload={'username': 'famatyyk', 'password': 'ctoa-owner'})
assert status == 200, data
owner_token = data['token']
print('OWNER_LOGIN_OK')

status, data = req('/api/auth/me', token=owner_token)
assert status == 200 and data['user']['role'] == 'owner', data
print('ME_OK')

status, data = req('/api/auth/register', 'POST', payload={'username': 'beast_member', 'password': 'beastpass123', 'role': 'member'})
assert status in (200, 409), data
print('REGISTER_OK', status)

status, data = req('/api/community/invite', 'POST', token=owner_token, payload={'username': 'beast_member', 'role': 'operator'})
assert status == 200, data
invite_code = data['invite']['code']
print('INVITE_OK')

status, data = req('/api/auth/login', 'POST', payload={'username': 'beast_member', 'password': 'beastpass123'})
assert status == 200, data
member_token = data['token']
print('MEMBER_LOGIN_OK')

status, data = req('/api/community/invite/accept', 'POST', token=member_token, payload={'code': invite_code})
assert status == 200, data
member_token = data['token']
print('ACCEPT_OK')

status, data = req('/api/community/members', token=member_token)
assert status == 200 and any(m['username'] == 'beast_member' for m in data['members']), data
print('MEMBERS_OK')

status, data = req('/api/community/feed', token=member_token)
assert status == 200, data
print('FEED_OK')

status, data = req('/api/community/invites', token=owner_token)
assert status == 200, data
print('INVITES_OK')

print('HTTP_AUTH_COMMUNITY_E2E_OK')
